element_extract.core_engine: A powerful class or identity comes with visible constraints; comedy and tension arise when outsiders overestimate the protagonist while the protagonist manages cost, dependency, and misunderstanding.
element_extract.protagonist_pressure: Power solves one visible problem while creating appetite, reputation, or retainer-management debt.
scene_engine: constraint appears before or alongside power
protagonist delegates or manages a dependent actor
new debt or appetite creates the next episode
anti_patterns: retainers who all speak or function the same
